8k_detail.extracto: Item 5.02. Departure of Directors or Certain Officers; Election of Directors; Appointment of Certain Officers; Compensatory Arrangements of Certain Officers. Protara Therapeutics, Inc. (the Company ) announced that Leonardo Viana Nicacio, M.D., Chief Medical Officer of the Company, resigned from the Company to explore other opportunities, effective as of June 26, 2026. Dr. Nicacio's duties will be subsumed by Carla Beckham, M.D., the Company's Lead Medical Director and Head of Clinical Development, and will continue under the oversight of Jacqueline Zummo, Ph.D., the Company's Chief Research & Development Officer. 1 SIGNATURES Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned hereunto duly authorized. Date: June 29, 2026 Protara Therapeutics, Inc. By: /s/ Patrick Fabbio Patrick Fabbio Chief Financial Officer 2

8k_detail.extracto: Item 5.02. Departure of Directors or Certain Officers; Election of Directors; Appointment of Certain Officers; Compensatory Arrangements of Certain Officers. Protara Therapeutics, Inc. (the Company ) announced that Leonardo Viana Nicacio, M.D., Chief Medical Officer of the Company, resigned from the Company to explore other opportunities, effective as of June 26, 2026. Dr. Nicacio's duties will be subsumed by Carla Beckham, M.D., the Company's Lead Medical Director and Head of Clinical Development, and will continue under the oversight of Jacqueline Zummo, Ph.D., the Company's Chief Research & Development Officer. 1 SIGNATURES Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned hereunto duly authorized. Date: June 29, 2026 Protara Therapeutics, Inc. By: /s/ Patrick Fabbio Patrick Fabbio Chief Financial Officer 2
